title: dactylorhiza okellyi
intro: Dactylorhiza okellyi, also known as the Okelly's Orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Ireland. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza okellyi typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used in teas, capsules, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
